query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isArchived = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_archived,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isArchived = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as archived,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isArchived IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_archived
FROM quotations 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND dataOrigin = 'manual'

  SUM(CASE WHEN isArchived = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_archived,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isArchived = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as archived,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isArchived IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_archived
FROM quotations 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
